name: How do I make Siri read answers out loud instead of just showing them?
description: Check Siri’s voice and response settings on the device you are using; voice behavior varies by platform.

mainEntity.name: How do I make Siri read answers out loud instead of just showing them?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you want Siri to speak results aloud, device settings matter. Apple documents that Siri can respond by voice, and users can control voice behavior through Siri and Apple Intelligence settings on supported devices. On iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, HomePod, and CarPlay, the activation method and spoken response options vary.
acceptedAnswer.description: Check Siri’s voice and response settings on the device you are using; voice behavior varies by platform.
